title: Nami Looks for Sky Island Clues
description: A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Bellamy, Nami, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate, Luffy. A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: OHHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH? Those two are gonna fight bellamy!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: C'mon, let me see what ya got...!

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: Do you know anything about it!?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: sk... PFFT! Sky Island, she said!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Haha haha haha! Stop! Yes killin' me!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Log poses screw up all the time!

summary: A strange pirate with a huge appetite and an opposite taste from Luffy crosses paths with the crew, hinting at a major future rival.
